name: librepository-java
title: librepository-java
summary: abstraction library for accessing hierachic bulk content
description:
abstraction library for accessing hierachic bulk content
LibRepository provides a simple abstraction layer to access bulk content that
is organized in a hierarchical layer.
.
Unlike the JSR-000170, this library does not aim to solve all problems
associated with content storages. The main purpose of LibRepository is to
give users an abstract view over an filesystem like structure so that content
generator and content consumer do no longer have to make assumptions about
where to store the generated content.
.
The repositories described here should not be used to store other things than
BLOBs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use librepository-java because abstraction library for accessing hierachic bulk content.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use librepository-java as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair librepository-java with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `librepository-java --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
